title: Paper Accurate Block Placement
description: implementation of the accurate block protocol and flexible block protocol for paper/purpur
body:
A maintained version of [Dungeon Dev's Spigot Accurate Place Plugin](https://github.com/DungeonDev/SpigotAccurateBlockPlacement) updated for modern minecraft versions and aimed at Paper/Purpur servers.

An implementation of the Carpet Accurate Block Placement Protocol for Paper-based servers and its forks. Adds support for FlexibleBlockPlacement from Tweakeroo and easyPlace from Litematica. 

Features
- carpet's Accurate Block Placement Protocol
- tweakeroo's Flexible Block Placement
- litematica's easyPlace (specifically using Version 2)
- vertical placement (pistons, observers, etc.)
